title: Deep Secret Gorgeous Red Bush Rose Plant- Garden Plant in 3L Pot- Perfect for Gift
features: VARIETY: Deep Secret hybrid tea is a stunning red rose variety known for its rich, deep crimson blooms and classic rose fragrance
GROWTH CHARACTERISTICS: Produces clusters of beautiful flowers throughout the growing season, ideal for creating stunning garden displays
MATURE SIZE: Grows to approximately 80-100 centimetres in height, making it perfect for borders and medium-sized garden spaces
PLANTING SPECIFICATIONS: Supplied in a 3-litre pot with well-established root system, ready for immediate planting in your garden
CARE REQUIREMENTS: Thrives in full sun to partial shade, requires well-draining soil and regular watering for optimal growth
description: Transform your garden with the stunning Deep Secret hybrid tea rose bush, a magnificent specimen that produces clusters of rich red blooms. This robust plant, supplied in a 3-litre pot, offers an impressive display of classic roses that will create a striking focal point in your outdoor space. The Deep Secret variety is known for its gorgeous deep red petals and classic rose fragrance, making it an excellent choice for both experienced gardeners and newcomers alike. Perfect as a thoughtful gift or a treat for your own garden, this rose bush can be planted in borders, containers, or used to create beautiful hedging. The floribunda classification means you'll enjoy multiple blooms per stem throughout the flowering season, ensuring a spectacular show of colour. Supplied as a well-established plant in a 3-litre pot, it's ready to be transferred to your chosen spot in the garden. For best results, plant in a sunny position with well-draining soil.

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Cut Flower, Disease Resistant, Extended Bloom Time, Repeat Flowering
